html_lang_valid.0: The default human language of the page must be valid and specified in accordance with BCP 47
html_lang_valid.Fail_1: Specified 'lang' attribute does not include a valid primary language

html_lang_exists.0: Page must identify the default language of the document with a 'lang' attribute
html_lang_exists.Fail_3: Page detected as HTML, but does not have a 'lang' attribute

html_skipnav_exists.0: Provide a way to bypass blocks of content that are repeated on multiple Web pages
html_skipnav_exists.Potential_1: Verify there is a way to bypass blocks of content that are repeated on multiple Web pages

skip_main_exists.0: Pages must provide a way to skip directly to the main content
skip_main_exists.Fail_1: The page does not provide a way to quickly navigate to the main content (ARIA "main" landmark or a skip link)

a_text_purpose.0: Hyperlinks must have an accessible name for their purpose
a_text_purpose.fail_acc_name: Hyperlink has no link text, label or image with a text alternative

img_alt_valid.0: Images must have accessible names unless they are decorative or redundant
img_alt_valid.fail_no_alt: The image has neither an accessible name nor is marked as decorative or redundant

text_contrast_sufficient.0: The contrast ratio of text with its background must meet WCAG AA requirements
text_contrast_sufficient.potential_graphic_background: Verify the contrast ratio of the text against the lightest and the darkest colors of the background meets the WCAG AA minimum requirements for text of size {1}px and weight of {2}
